lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear. It is currently not operational and requires major mechanical repairs.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections including small stone chips and light scratches. The interior shows light wear but remains clean.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it left the showroom. The exterior paint is flawless, featuring a deep, mirror-like finish without a single scratch, chip, or swirl mark. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with leather upholstery that shows no signs of wear and a dashboard that remains factory-fresh. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained and garage-kept its entire life. Every feature, from the infotainment system to the climate control, operates flawlessly. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in showroom-perfect state.

Looking for a reliable ride that's ready to go? This car is in good condition and has been clearly well-maintained over the years! It runs smoothly and looks great, showing only minor signs of use that you'd expect from a well-loved vehicle. It's a solid, dependable choice for anyone wanting quality without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require a significant investment of time and money to return it to a roadworthy state. The engine has a severe oil leak and the transmission shifts roughly, suggesting internal damage. The exterior shows substantial rust along the wheel wells and rocker panels, and the clear coat is peeling across the hood and roof. Inside, the cabin has seen heavy wear, with torn seats and a non-functional climate control system. This car is being sold as-is and is recommended for someone looking for a major project or for parts.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Exhibiting consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with long-term reliability. Our rigorous inspection process ensures that this selection meets our exacting standards for quality and value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my trips. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend getaway, this car is ready to hit the road with you. I've taken great care of it, and it's looking for a new owner who will appreciate it just as much as I have. Come take a look—you're going to love it!

This E92 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 and a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox. The powertrain delivers a linear 414 hp with an 8,400 RPM redline, supported by a recent preventative rod bearing service and updated throttle actuators to ensure mechanical longevity. Equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and the M Variable Differential Lock, the chassis remains composed and communicative under lateral load. The vehicle exhibits minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, but remains structurally sound with a well-maintained subframe and cooling system. This is a mechanically sorted enthusiast build optimized for peak atmospheric performance.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Routine maintenance complete.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility, presenting in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, non-smoker environment featuring supple leather seating and a fully functional suite of modern technology features. Mechanically, the car is sound, having undergone regular preventative maintenance and fluid changes; the engine pulls strong, and the gear transitions are seamless. It comes with a complete service history and a fresh detail, making it ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence. This is a reliable, high-quality example that has been treated with the utmost respect.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and longevity. Our rigorous inspection process ensures that this model meets high standards of operational excellence. Secure a sophisticated driving experience that prioritizes both reliability and value.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Maintained to rigorous standards, the mechanical integrity remains uncompromised, ensuring a seamless driving experience. The interior and exterior reflect conscientious ownership, presenting a clean, professional aesthetic suitable for the most discerning buyer. We invite you to experience the reliability and refined engineering that define this particular model.

Hey there! I'm parting with my favorite ride and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it's ready to hit the road with a new owner today! It's super reliable and still looks great inside and out. Perfect for someone who wants a quality car they can count on. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This meticulously maintained sports coupe features a high-revving, naturally aspirated flat-six engine mated to a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The drivetrain is mechanically sound, benefiting from a recent IMS bearing retrofit and a reinforced clutch assembly for improved torque transfer. The suspension architecture remains tight, utilizing upgraded Bilstein dampers and poly-bushed control arms to ensure communicative steering feedback and neutral handling through the apex. While the exterior shows minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the chassis integrity and thermal management systems are optimal. Equipped with a limited-slip differential and a free-flowing stainless steel exhaust, this vehicle offers a visceral, analog driving experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Ready for immediate use.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience and stands as a testament to responsible ownership. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor, age-appropriate imperfections, while the body panels remain straight with consistent gap fitment. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, boasting supple leather upholstery with minimal wear and a fully functional suite of modern technology and dual-zone climate controls. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has been serviced regularly according to the manufacturer's schedule, resulting in a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that delivers power effortlessly. The tires have excellent tread life remaining on pristine alloy wheels, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. A complete service history is available, ensuring total peace of mind for the next owner.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been meticulously curated to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, balancing proven performance with lasting value. For the discerning buyer seeking a reliable and well-presented investment, this offering stands as a testament to quality stewardship and consistent maintenance.

Presenting a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been meticulously maintained to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balanced synthesis of luxury and value. Detailed inspection confirms its robust operational status and refined presentation.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for all your road trips and daily commutes. It’s been well-loved and runs smoothly, so I know you’re going to have a blast behind the wheel. Come take a look!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies. It boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a meticulously maintained VANOS system, ensuring peak mechanical reliability. Power is delivered through a precise ZF 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. The suspension has been upgraded with Bilstein B16 coilovers for superior damping and roll center correction. With its high-revving atmospheric induction and telepathic steering rack, this chassis offers an analog performance experience that remains highly sought after.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs smooth.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of performance and long-term reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor, superficial road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery remains firm and supportive, while all electronic features—including the premium audio system, navigation, and dual-zone climate control—function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, having been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. Recent maintenance includes a full synthetic oil change, new brake pads, and a fresh set of tires. It handles beautifully, shifts smoothly through all gears, and provides a quiet, composed ride on both city streets and highways. Included with the sale are two sets of keys, the original owner’s manuals, and a comprehensive folder of service records. This is a dependable, high-quality vehicle that is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior driving experience and a refined aesthetic. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this model serves as a testament to diligent ownership and consistent mechanical care. It represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and reliability.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and structural integrity. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust drivetrain, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience and represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning professional.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's looking for a new adventure! It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're heading out on a road trip or just cruising around town, this car is ready to go. It’s been well-maintained and still has so much life left in it. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it drives!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. The chassis remains composed thanks to a reinforced subframe and refreshed bushings, while the variable M differential lock ensures optimal power delivery. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and valve adjustment, ensuring the high-strung valvetrain performs flawlessly. A mechanically sound enthusiast's choice that balances visceral performance with everyday reliability.
Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained engine. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle is a prime example of well-maintained luxury, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. The exterior showcases a vibrant finish with only minor surface marks typical of light use, while the body remains straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring supple leather seating, a functional power sunroof, and an intuitive infotainment system that operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has been serviced regularly, with recent records showing a new battery and fresh fluids. The engine pulls strongly without hesitation, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet ride. This car represents a perfect balance for a buyer seeking a high-end feel and mechanical peace of mind.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, confirming its status as a reliable and well-maintained asset. It offers a seamless fusion of performance and utility, representing a superior value proposition within its class. We invite you to experience the refined engineering and sustained quality of this distinguished automobile.
